evidence: Maryland state police record check shows no Maryland convictions; no FBI, national, court clearance, or immigration record checks are included.
explanation: The only available source has a closed-world scope limited to Maryland state convictions, which is insufficient to affirm absence of any murder conviction (federal, other-state, or foreign). The binding policy requires a criminal_history_check or court_clearance source with broader closed-world scope to bind false, and no affirmative evidence of a murder conviction exists to bind true.
